subject: fix(issue): complete-slice retries forever when gsd_replan_slice is the correct outcome
fix(bug-2): TUI crashes instead of handling missing native visibleWidth added a TUI-side JS visible-width fallback so render paths do not propagate native proxy throws.
fix: preserve discovered skill prompt fallback
fix(bug-2): Missing uninstall instructions in README added README uninstall steps for global package removal and local state cleanup.
fix(bug-2): Generated files ignore .gitignore rules smart staging now honors `.gitignore` for `.gsd` even when files were already tracked.
fix: dereference pnpm symlinks when seeding global validate-pack deps
fix(bootstrap): exit on EPIPE storm instead of swallowing in a tight loop
fix: block closeout resolution when git status is unavailable
feat: enhance tool execution handling and improve component registration
fix: project root artifacts into worktrees
fix(pi-ai): derive Mistral stream message type from request shape
fix(issue): Artifact renderers use inconsistent gsdRoot vs gsdProjectionRoot when running inside a worktree causing stale-mirror verification failures
fix: unstick unit and portability CI
fix: seed bundled transitive deps in validate-pack global smoke
fix(test): unblock coverage-report package test failures
fix(bug-2): Command error reporting omits stack traces extension command errors now include stack traces when available.
fix: preserve hook model overrides in orchestrator path
feat(models): add dedicated uat model slot in preferences
fix: align GSD drift artifact resolution
fix(bug-1): fileFingerprint crashes on dirty files over 2 GiB oversized dirty tracked files now avoid Node's readFileSync Buffer limit.
fix(bug-2): Pytest command runs from wrong cwd in monorepo subproject setup corrected repository root resolution so verification executes in the intended subproject cwd.
fix: use pnpm camelCase package import setting
fix(issue): Crash/hang at question & save gates: `ProcessTransport is not ready for writing` falls through guard to process.exit(1)

fix(bug-1): Zero-tool-call retries spin on provider error messages zero-tool-call completions with transient provider/rate-limit assistant messages now pause with backoff/auto-resume instead of immediate retry.
